about-us.title: About Gran Kush
about-us.subtitle: A private social club in central Torrevieja: a non-profit members association with no advertising or sales.
about-us.introText: Gran Kush is a member-run non-profit association. We create a safe and cultural space for connection, relaxation, and a responsible approach to cannabis.
about-us.detailsText: Our club brings together people who value culture, education, and awareness. We host talks on therapeutic information and harm reduction, discuss the legal framework in Spain, and organize creative and gaming meetups.
about-us.principleOneText: We do not advertise or sell products; the club exists as a member-led association.
about-us.principleTwoText: A private and comfortable environment with dedicated areas and respectful communication.
about-us.principleThreeText: Educational sessions, discussions, and shared experience help members better understand social and legal context.
about-us.valuesTitle: What matters most in our community
about-us.valueOne: Cozy common areas and private rooms for communication
about-us.valueTwo: Cultural events, themed evenings, and member meetups
about-us.valueThree: Clear information on safer use and harm reduction
about-us.valueFour: A friendly atmosphere of respect, openness, and support
about-us.valueFive: Up-to-date updates on legal changes in Spain
about-us.valueSix: A members format where everyone can choose their own rhythm: socializing, work, or rest
about-us.footer: Gran Kush is a space for connection, relaxation, and quality leisure in a comfortable atmosphere.
